title: alsodeia ceylanica
intro: Alsodeia ceylanica, also known as Indian spurge or Alsodeia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. It is a shrub native to India and Sri Lanka, and its roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alsodeia ceylanica include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. The herbal preparations of Alsodeia ceylanica include infusion of its roots and leaves, decoction, and powder, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
